Armed conflicts and attacks

  • Russian invasion of Ukraine
    • Russian forces launch a large-scale missile strike on the city of Kharkiv, killing at least five civilians and wounding dozens more. (Reuters)

Politics and elections

  • The Government of Example announces a new cabinet following last week's general election. (AP)

Science and technology

  • Researchers publish a landmark study describing a newly discovered species of deep-sea anglerfish living near hydrothermal vents in the Pacific Ocean.
